title: Damage Control Priority
summary: Prioritizing repairs to maintain combat effectiveness.
details: Not all damage is equal. Priority order for repair: 1) Life support (crew death), 2) Propulsion (ability to maneuver/escape), 3) Weapons (ability to fight), 4) Sensors (ability to detect threats), 5) Hull breaches (contained), 6) Non-essential systems. Communicate damage status to crew and allies. Request assistance or withdraw if damage exceeds repair capacity.
annotations: Damage control parties are limited - allocate wisely.
Some systems may need to be sacrificed to save others.
